title: BitFun Page
loginRequired: Sign in to your account to publish and manage BitFun Pages on your relay server.
publishHint: Choose a local folder with index.html and/or server/worker.js. Saving creates an immutable review candidate; Deploy switches production.
reviewHint: Review a saved version with Preview before Deploy. Production URL only updates after Deploy.
pickDirectoryTitle: Select a site folder (index.html and/or server/worker.js)
slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. Production URL: /p/{username}/{slug}

private.label: Only me
private.description: Only you can open this page (requires your account token).

relay.label: Relay users
relay.description: Any signed-in user on this relay server can open it.

public.label: Public
public.description: Anyone on the internet can open it without signing in.

empty: No pages yet. Save a version to get started.
confirmDeleteVersion: Delete version {{versionId}}? This cannot be undone.
deletePageHint: To permanently delete this page and all versions, type the slug "{{slug}}" below.
confirmUnpublish: Delete page "{{title}}" and all versions? This cannot be undone.

errors.invalidSlug: Slug must match: lowercase letter/digit, then letters, digits, or hyphens (max 64).
errors.copyFailed: Could not copy URL to clipboard.
errors.slugMismatch: Type the exact page slug to confirm deletion.
